query: SELECT id, headline, source, confidence_score, created_at FROM macro_signals WHERE headline LIKE '%Sprint6%' OR headline LIKE '%Sprint 6%' OR headline LIKE '%Test Signal%' OR source LIKE '%test%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
